title: poikilogyne cornuta
intro: Poikilogyne cornuta is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's medicinal properties have been traditionally utilized to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Poikilogyne cornuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and provide relief from pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
